agent_message_parts_shape_check.name: agent_message_parts_shape_check
agent_message_parts_shape_check.value: ("agent_message_parts"."part_type" = 'text' and "agent_message_parts"."text_content" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_usage" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_kind" is null) or ("agent_message_parts"."part_type" = 'asset_ref' and "agent_message_parts"."text_content" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_version_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_usage" in ('attachment', 'context') and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_kind" is null) or ("agent_message_parts"."part_type" = 'artifact_ref' and "agent_message_parts"."text_content" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_version_id" is null and "agent_message_parts"."asset_usage" is null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_version_id" is not null and "agent_message_parts"."artifact_kind" in ('image', 'audio', 'video', 'slide', 'interactive', 'document'))

artifact_generation_jobs_failure_shape_c.name: artifact_generation_jobs_failure_shape_check
artifact_generation_jobs_failure_shape_c.value: ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" = 'failed' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."failure_code" is not null and char_length("artifact_generation_jobs"."failure_code") between 1 and 128) or ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" <> 'failed' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."failure_code" is null)

artifact_generation_jobs_lifecycle_shape.name: artifact_generation_jobs_lifecycle_shape_check
artifact_generation_jobs_lifecycle_shape.value: ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" = 'queued' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."started_at" is null and "artifact_generation_jobs"."completed_at" is null) or ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" = 'running' and "artifact_generation_jobs"."started_at" is not null and "artifact_generation_jobs"."completed_at" is null) or ("artifact_generation_jobs"."status" in ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled') and "artifact_generation_jobs"."completed_at" is not null)

artifact_versions_content_shape_check.name: artifact_versions_content_shape_check
artifact_versions_content_shape_check.value: ("artifact_versions"."content" is not null and "artifact_versions"."object_key" is null and "artifact_versions"."checksum" is null) or ("artifact_versions"."content" is null and "artifact_versions"."object_key" is not null and "artifact_versions"."checksum" is not null)

artifact_versions_object_key_check.name: artifact_versions_object_key_check
artifact_versions_object_key_check.value: "artifact_versions"."object_key" is null or (char_length("artifact_versions"."object_key") between 1 and 1024 and "artifact_versions"."checksum" ~ '^[0-9a-f]{64}$')

artifacts_text_check.name: artifacts_text_check
artifacts_text_check.value: char_length("artifacts"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and char_length("artifacts"."title") between 1 and 300

asset_versions_failure_shape_check.name: asset_versions_failure_shape_check
asset_versions_failure_shape_check.value: ("asset_versions"."status" = 'failed' and "asset_versions"."failure_code" is not null) or ("asset_versions"."status" <> 'failed' and "asset_versions"."failure_code" is null)

assets_status_shape_check.name: assets_status_shape_check
assets_status_shape_check.value: ("assets"."status" = 'ready' and "assets"."current_version_id" is not null and "assets"."tombstoned_at" is null) or ("assets"."status" in ('pending', 'processing', 'failed') and "assets"."current_version_id" is null and "assets"."tombstoned_at" is null) or ("assets"."status" = 'tombstoned' and "assets"."tombstoned_at" is not null)

assets_text_shape_check.name: assets_text_shape_check
assets_text_shape_check.value: char_length("assets"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and char_length("assets"."display_name") between 1 and 300 and ("assets"."mime_type" is null or char_length("assets"."mime_type") between 1 and 255)

chat_messages_idempotency_fields_check.name: chat_messages_idempotency_fields_check
chat_messages_idempotency_fields_check.value: ("chat_messages"."role" = 'student' and "chat_messages"."client_message_id" is not null and "chat_messages"."request_hash" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "chat_messages"."client_message_id" is null and "chat_messages"."request_hash" is null)

chat_messages_terminal_timestamps_check.name: chat_messages_terminal_timestamps_check
chat_messages_terminal_timestamps_check.value: ("chat_messages"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') and "chat_messages"."completed_at" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."status" in ('pending', 'streaming') and "chat_messages"."completed_at" is null)

chat_messages_cancelled_timestamp_check.name: chat_messages_cancelled_timestamp_check
chat_messages_cancelled_timestamp_check.value: ("chat_messages"."status" = 'cancelled' and "chat_messages"."cancelled_at" is not null and "chat_messages"."cancel_requested_at" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."status" <> 'cancelled' and "chat_messages"."cancelled_at" is null)

chat_messages_lease_shape_check.name: chat_messages_lease_shape_check
chat_messages_lease_shape_check.value: ("chat_messages"."role" = 'student' and "chat_messages"."lease_id" is null and "chat_messages"."lease_expires_at" is null and "chat_messages"."heartbeat_at" is null) or ("chat_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "chat_messages"."status" in ('pending', 'streaming') and "chat_messages"."lease_id" is not null and "chat_messages"."lease_expires_at" is not null and "chat_messages"."heartbeat_at" is not null) or ("chat_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "chat_messages"."status" in ('completed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted', 'failed') and "chat_messages"."lease_id" is null and "chat_messages"."lease_expires_at" is null)

conversation_messages_terminal_check.name: conversation_messages_terminal_check
conversation_messages_terminal_check.value: ("conversation_messages"."status" in ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') and "conversation_messages"."completed_at" is not null) or ("conversation_messages"."status" in ('pending', 'streaming') and "conversation_messages"."completed_at" is null)

conversations_archive_shape_check.name: conversations_archive_shape_check
conversations_archive_shape_check.value: ("conversations"."status" = 'active' and "conversations"."archived_at" is null) or ("conversations"."status" = 'archived' and "conversations"."archived_at" is not null)

conversations_text_check.name: conversations_text_check
conversations_text_check.value: char_length("conversations"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and "conversations"."agent_profile_id" ~ '^[a-z][a-z0-9._-]{0,127}$' and ("conversations"."title" is null or char_length("conversations"."title") between 1 and 300)

knowledge_chunks_content_check.name: knowledge_chunks_content_check
knowledge_chunks_content_check.value: char_length("knowledge_chunks"."content") between 1 and 20000 and ("knowledge_chunks"."heading" is null or char_length("knowledge_chunks"."heading") between 1 and 500)

knowledge_chunks_page_check.name: knowledge_chunks_page_check
knowledge_chunks_page_check.value: ("knowledge_chunks"."page_start" is null and "knowledge_chunks"."page_end" is null) or ("knowledge_chunks"."page_start" is not null and "knowledge_chunks"."page_end" is not null and "knowledge_chunks"."page_start" >= 1 and "knowledge_chunks"."page_end" >= "knowledge_chunks"."page_start")

knowledge_documents_failure_shape_check.name: knowledge_documents_failure_shape_check
knowledge_documents_failure_shape_check.value: ("knowledge_documents"."parse_status" = 'parse_failed' and "knowledge_documents"."failure_code" is not null and char_length("knowledge_documents"."failure_code") between 1 and 128) or ("knowledge_documents"."parse_status" <> 'parse_failed' and "knowledge_documents"."failure_code" is null)

knowledge_sources_tombstone_check.name: knowledge_sources_tombstone_check
knowledge_sources_tombstone_check.value: ("knowledge_sources"."status" = 'active' and "knowledge_sources"."tombstoned_at" is null) or ("knowledge_sources"."status" = 'tombstoned' and "knowledge_sources"."tombstoned_at" is not null)

knowledge_sources_text_shape_check.name: knowledge_sources_text_shape_check
knowledge_sources_text_shape_check.value: char_length("knowledge_sources"."grade_band") between 1 and 64 and char_length("knowledge_sources"."course_slug") between 1 and 128 and char_length("knowledge_sources"."source_key") between 1 and 128 and char_length("knowledge_sources"."title") between 1 and 300

lesson_sessions_archive_timestamp_check.name: lesson_sessions_archive_timestamp_check
lesson_sessions_archive_timestamp_check.value: ("lesson_sessions"."status" = 'active' and "lesson_sessions"."archived_at" is null) or ("lesson_sessions"."status" = 'archived' and "lesson_sessions"."archived_at" is not null)

model_runs_teaching_turn_shape_check.name: model_runs_teaching_turn_shape_check
model_runs_teaching_turn_shape_check.value: "model_runs"."operation_kind" = 'teaching_turn' and "model_runs"."assistant_message_id" is not null and "model_runs"."turn_id" is not null and "model_runs"."operation_id" = "model_runs"."turn_id" and "model_runs"."phase" in ('answer', 'synthesis')

model_runs_usage_check.name: model_runs_usage_check
model_runs_usage_check.value: coalesce("model_runs"."input_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."output_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."cache_hit_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."reasoning_tokens", 0) >= 0 and coalesce("model_runs"."latency_ms", 0) >= 0

model_runs_lifecycle_timestamps_check.name: model_runs_lifecycle_timestamps_check
model_runs_lifecycle_timestamps_check.value: ("model_runs"."status" = 'pending' and "model_runs"."started_at" is null and "model_runs"."completed_at" is null) or ("model_runs"."status" = 'running' and "model_runs"."started_at" is not null and "model_runs"."completed_at" is null) or ("model_runs"."status" in ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') and "model_runs"."completed_at" is not null)

spaces_text_check.name: spaces_text_check
spaces_text_check.value: char_length("spaces"."owner_subject_id") between 1 and 160 and char_length("spaces"."title") between 1 and 300

spaces_archive_shape_check.name: spaces_archive_shape_check
spaces_archive_shape_check.value: ("spaces"."status" = 'active' and "spaces"."archived_at" is null) or ("spaces"."status" = 'archived' and "spaces"."archived_at" is not null)

tool_calls_lifecycle_check.name: tool_calls_lifecycle_check
tool_calls_lifecycle_check.value: ("tool_calls"."status" = 'pending' and "tool_calls"."started_at" is null and "tool_calls"."completed_at" is null) or ("tool_calls"."status" = 'running' and "tool_calls"."started_at" is not null and "tool_calls"."completed_at" is null) or ("tool_calls"."status" in ('succeeded', 'rejected', 'failed', 'outcome_unknown') and "tool_calls"."completed_at" is not null)

tool_calls_result_shape_check.name: tool_calls_result_shape_check
tool_calls_result_shape_check.value: ("tool_calls"."status" = 'succeeded' and "tool_calls"."result_summary" is not null and "tool_calls"."code" is null) or ("tool_calls"."status" in ('rejected', 'failed', 'outcome_unknown') and "tool_calls"."result_summary" is null and "tool_calls"."code" is not null) or ("tool_calls"."status" in ('pending', 'running') and "tool_calls"."result_summary" is null and "tool_calls"."code" is null)
